name: Sara Lee's Chocolate Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat oil and sugar with egg using an electric mixer until smooth.
2. Add vanilla, salt, and baking soda to the mixture; beat well to blend.
3. Mix milk and lemon juice in a separate bowl until slightly curdled, then pour into the batter while continuously beating.
4. Blend in cocoa powder and flour by continuing to beat for 3 minutes after adding the last ingredient, scraping the sides and bottom of the bowl frequently.
5. Divide the batter evenly among 12 paper-lined cupcake wells.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow cupcakes to cool in the pan on a rack for 20 minutes before transferring them to a platter to continue cooling.
8. Frost as desired.
